1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

3.description: get buildings in Trondheim (filter by kommunenummer)

4.description: get quick-clay release areas with the chosen high risk class

5.description: find buildings that intersect the high-risk quick-clay areas

6.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

7.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with min(distance_m)

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
